name: Bloom Vernon Elementary School
description: Bloom Vernon Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in South Webster, OH. There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: LifeCenter Portsmouth, Ohio
description: Come play pickleball at LifeCenter Portsmouth, Ohio in Portsmouth, OH! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Mound Park
description: Mound Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Portsmouth, OH. There are 18 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Oak Intermediate School
description: Come play pickleball at Oak Intermediate School in New Boston, OH! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Wheelersburg Community Park
description: Wheelersburg Community Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wheelersburg, OH. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
